textByHash.6a283f9e093cec0d4666277d748e1e6859fdb0b5: Everything! The wonders right here in this museum, collected from all corners of the land.
textByHash.f1906b1a4891cae32822e429f9b8a8f19b693921: Matter of fact, I consider myself quite the collector. I keep a record of just about everything that I find!
textByHash.6de3b02a8dbf6355bceac609b38da9bd2380098a: Would you like one? You could keep track of your own collections.
textByHash.29ef7487245a6cfeefa812243bf3e7dcd63d4605: I should've guessed you wouldn't understand the true beauty of a good collection!
textByHash.924e4bc9e9a54fb321cd2e484bc12e3553b70cf8: There! Now you'll be able to see the true beauty of everything you collect on your adventures.
textByHash.5e9ee3d7f1852ab67367c8a58e5b5e289a09d2a5: You might struggle to carry that right now.
textByHash.fe77917277b8de99b3ef4d5a23feefe17f269a01: Don't you have one lying around somewhere already?
textByHash.cb3bf56cbcd25aea2f168da432d814f08030d233: I'd love to count everything you've collected on your adventures!
textByHash.96711d76d38fa56de6751bea4cc46c397b1130ab: You might want to take a seat this could take a while.
textByHash.db14142e6b4f9846708ca8369ee8b2fb25575d21: From what I can see you have collected items in your collection!
textByHash.c73404ed4dc128551701624ac6794b7933a2b08d: You've made a good start at filling your collection, keep at it!
textByHash.a772be574635b8bbab556ce1a571a09cafa5a16e: I see you are just starting out on your collecting adventure. I wish you luck!
textByHash.15a10d55d9cd88b23fa9bf136ccbbab84a02d7de: You're starting to get a hang of this collecting business!
textByHash.57ad2879b03c40dda69f73033ecaac79d001a627: You have a very respectable collection indeed, one day you'll have a better collection than me!
textByHash.dfbf4618a238720d3b16f672df37429e09e15791: Your collection is maturing well, you're making great strides to becoming a top collector, keep it up!
textByHash.edf771a0a1bc443213df89066f48eecea3a1d25a: Your collection is one of the finest I've seen, it's almost on par with mine!!
textByHash.df9837b605dd7afdfab77e536cd5c345a900d94d: Colour me impressed, you've collected more items than me! I look forward to seeing your collection grow even more.
textByHash.735005c34bb95d1578e052fefe5730a639c9e3a1: Now that's an impressive collection, I haven't seen many with a collection better than yours!
textByHash.a2edeaf6a55e797bda67ff2e34e59db95e95ef3f: I can officially say that you are now an elite collector and few can stand as your equal in that regard.
textByHash.c7380f73f8c28ef0dc19a8ddb22c58f198849521: Wait, you finished it? You actually finished the entire collection? I never thought that was even possible!
textByHash.40aa11a2eb18e322081c76901203719bdc517ab2: As an accomplished collector I'd like to offer you a special reward.
textByHash.844310f3eb74cb912d21eb12252acb8bb80671a7: Actually, it appears you already have all the rewards I'd like to give you.
textByHash.eaf3eef62125a47bbaa49e91b7265284c791147e: This... idea! The idea of something nice! Those nice little tokens!
textByHash.e20ec35c7543f75ac7242a1a1f217231b73c731b: Only some? Well you need more! Until you have them, I should get going...
